key_events_next_24h.name: FOMC Rate Decision (April 2026, Day 2)
key_events_next_24h.note: Rate hold 3.50-3.75% near-certain (CME FedWatch 100%). Pre-event uncertainty driving BTC selloff today (-1.6%). Hold is priced in — no shock expected.

key_events_next_24h.name: Fed Chair Powell Press Conference
key_events_next_24h.note: Powell's likely final meeting adds uncertainty on forward guidance. Hawkish tone risk elevated with oil at $104+. Tone is the key catalyst.

key_events_next_24h.name: Spot BTC ETF Daily Flow Report
key_events_next_24h.note: BlackRock IBIT leading inflows. 9+ consecutive days positive. Institutional demand provides structural BTC floor.

key_events_next_24h.name: US-Iran / Hormuz Watch
key_events_next_24h.note: Hormuz still restricted, Brent crude above $104. No resolution imminent. Sustained oil pressure dampens Fed dovish pivot expectations.

notes: FOMC 금리 동결 확실, 파월 발언 방향 주목. BTC $76K 하락

analysis.btc_price_note: BTC ~$76,343 as of Apr 28 09:00 ET (13:00 UTC). Opened $77,368 today, down -1.6% from Monday open ($78,661). $80K resistance intact; support ~$75,000 (100-day MA).
sentiment_key_signals: Fear & Greed Index: 47 (Neutral) — recovered from 33 (Fear) yesterday and 29 last week
BTC down -1.6% today ahead of FOMC meeting (Apr 28-29 decision)
Technical indicators: 19 bearish vs 9 bullish signals (short-term bias bearish)
Strategy (MicroStrategy) bought $2.54B BTC — largest buy in 17 months (bullish signal)
BlackRock IBIT: 9+ consecutive days positive ETF inflows (institutional support)
KelpDAO exploit: $292M stolen, $14B DeFi TVL exodus — altcoins hit harder than BTC
Brent crude >$104/barrel — sustained inflation concern for Fed
FOMC Apr 28-29: rate hold 3.50-3.75% near-certain; Powell presser is key risk
No CPI/PPI releases in next 24h (CPI Apr release: May 12; PPI Apr release: May 13)
analysis.macro_backdrop: FOMC Day 1 Apr 28 (underway), decision Apr 29 18:00 UTC. Rate hold near-certain but pre-event uncertainty weighing on BTC today. Powell press conference (18:30 UTC Apr 29) is the key directional catalyst — tone on forward guidance matters. Oil at $104+ reduces likelihood of dovish signal. ETF inflows remain positive structural support offsetting macro headwinds.
analysis.regime_rationale: Neutral (0.55): FOMC pre-event selloff, -1.6% BTC today, 19 vs 9 bearish technical indicators, and elevated oil prices lean bearish short-term. Offset by Strategy $2.54B purchase, 9+ days of positive ETF inflows, and F&G recovering from Fear (33) to Neutral (47). Confidence at 0.55 — macro filter ACTIVE. Mixed signals favor caution; no strong directional trade recommended until after Powell presser Apr 29.
